Friend,

For years, Donna Shalala accepted the status quo as a longtime Washington Insider. Now, as a Congresswoman, she's doing the same thing!

It’s been just over a year since Shalala entered Congress and while House Republicans have been focusing on addressing important issues, Donna Shalala and radical Democrats have only focused on impeachment and obstruction.

And the only pieces of legislation that Shalala puts her name on are nothing more than last minute band-aids meant to gain publicity, not solve our problems.

Frankly, I give her a failing grade as our representative for FL-27 - but I want to know where YOU stand. Will you weigh in now with your grade?

subject: I'm running for my kids and grandkids.
body:
We have to win. For them. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ed21234bd5)

---
| Peter, When I look at my two sons, their wonderful wives, and my four adorable grandchildren (five soon!), I see the reason I'm running for Congress.

We have to preserve the American Dream for the next generation. It's our duty.

The rising tide of socialism and far-left values threatens that. The country, our kids and grandkids, deserve better than the Squad Kendra Horn teamed up with to elect Nancy Pelosi.

They deserve freedom. That's why I'm running, because we need a Congress that fights for freedom, not socialism.

[**Will you help us in our fight to flip Oklahoma's 5th district so we can stop the socialist Democrats and protect our fundamental freedoms for all Americans? Just $5, $10, $15, $25, $50, or any amount would be a huge help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e617bc3bc8&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3caed031d5&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| **National Journal says this is the nation's #1 battleground district.**

AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020."

Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1cf7bca9ad&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please contribute $5, $10, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us keep this country prosperous and free for our kids.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=43f7fd3371&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=309b2bc91c&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

subject: Tom’s path to the presidency relies on people like you being his delegate

| | | |

Hi friend, The path to the White House may not be easy, but it _is_ relatively straightforward: build support from voters, secure the party's nomination, and then win the general election. The second part, winning the Democratic nomination, requires delegates. [_**Will you sign up to be Tom 's Pennsylvania delegate before the deadline?**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P336bSuAKymTf649PDjOCjDGOz4H8AClvtYcYzWyEZovnMEp8eDol7BGvyZGU-2BEXg5rc9Tb-2FuDZykjHPCejeeiB23eN8x3cTHOqsmMz0TwIsIh4rMjsmB11D0n7u5u0V19uQZ7Uz12nNm-2FnfY0NSJTPim07cLaLCYxjg0e0jpJn1FMLPY6XylCdWpNzKwCY-2F158YA6-2F6gDxT-2ByKer2AnewfyqZA_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YeO8Di6ZF9wG31miJlYXHHmvQn204pOVskFLoLJMM8rbDFzxirmCGkdaiulKox9FDTEtFIwdH-2FdeLYFly5Bm4v72oAsHoXjviV02Qf-2F3tPYwtXx-2Bicrct8fZ2n4v2ZklLInFw8PAoOzXzNzkpqVD2qUXuo9KE4A02CIM1tkepETxZcUFG8ShE2Opp-2FSpuOLVu5iCcvf7pFPLGUXsdrLK6BSicYcNJ5ikBXlgM1b3UpRBWP8oFQnyfsgCkPhFB3HvO5697dU7UkpMQeyF5ZdkUv-2F1mXR-2BnWtkNHw9Yvq5s8w0YP-2B2T6LXVS8q14xmhdkfvTMq-2BPT1Cb5Rbv5Uf9MqAtzLfNwLbqsn6Y2pUfngerNPA-3D-3D) Tom needs delegates to represent _your_ community, and as one of his best supporters, you're uniquely qualified to step up today. Being a delegate is a fantastic opportunity to participate in our democracy in an impactful way! What are delegates, you might ask? They're voters and supporters (like you!) who represent the support for a candidate at big events like district and state conventions and the Democratic National Convention this July. Delegates are also crucial. It's a big responsibility, but it's a fun experience that makes you an incredibly important part of TeamTom. These are the _last few days_ to sign up to be a delegate in Pennsylvania. [_**Fill out this form today, and our team will be with you every step of the way.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P336bSuAKymTf649PDjOCjDGOz4H8AClvtYcYzWyEZovnMEp8eDol7BGvyZGU-2BEXg5rc9Tb-2FuDZykjHPCejeeiB23eN8x3cTHOqsmMz0TwIsIh4rMjsmB11D0n7u5u0V19uQZ7Uz12nNm-2FnfY0NSJTPim07cLaLCYxjg0e0jpJn1FMLPY6XylCdWpNzKwCY-2F158YA6-2F6gDxT-2ByKer2Anewf8jcO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YeO8Di6ZF9wG31miJlYXHHmvQn204pOVskFLoLJMM8rbDFzxirmCGkdaiulKox9FDTEtFIwdH-2FdeLYFly5Bm4v72oAsHoXjviV02Qf-2F3tPYwtXx-2Bicrct8fZ2n4v2ZklLJFGIGOk-2BFI5V0eHXoZo-2BWskaemDgs3ML4Ux-2FPexfyLN10VhMUWVLOHZNqeZWgZZbJ-2FxWV3zX7KtaKCarXrPjbcgDVV3r2a3PlJu5CKrpUiOYQFxwWzpIpgKhoH0Eoe81CrlzMYC9f7VpDKk-2FgOi3Pu3YfwzUy5EG2OCt9a5OjX4lXsRz0jAKWreMkff8sbyR3uaIyTO-2B9m3ndQHYvSNAxw53ZFznNuzwa-2Bi0qjZ-2FvdsA-3D-3D) As always, thanks for being with us on this path to win the nomination and defeat Donald Trump. Thank you,
Tom 2020

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: CNN: Trump lawyers begin Senate trial by LYING to the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | According to CNN, Trump's lawyers have already made numerous false and misleading claims. First, White House counsel Pat Cipollone claimed no Republican House members were allowed in the closed-door impeachment hearings to review confidential information. "This is false," CNN reports. 48 Republicans members of the three committees holding the hearings were allowed to participate and given equal time to question witnesses. Second, Cipollone lied about the time it took to transmit the articles of impeachment to the Senate. Third, Cipollone said that "the President was denied the right to cross-examine witnesses, the President was denied the right to access evidence, and the President was denied the right to have counsel present at [the Judiciary Committee] hearings." "This is false," CNN again reports. Rep. Nadler formally invited Trump to have a lawyer at the proceedings, and Cipollone turned down the offer. Given the situation is changing hourly in the Senate trial, we need to know: **Do you support the Senate removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf88/6e9863e8/812e732/1db056b5/61786725/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/j4Eupohy") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf88/6e9863e8/812e732/1db056b5/61786725/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/j4Eupohy") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf88/6e9863e8/812e732/1db056b4/61786725/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200123d.ND&refcode2=41hrmBIYoECkNUSjWw4u")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It’s official: Americans have stopped listening to the Swamp
body:
It’s day 3 of the Senate impeachment trial, and Americans have already tuned out. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cea0a57512&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **It’s official: Americans have stopped listening to the Swamp**

**It’s day 3** of the Senate impeachment trial, and Americans have already tuned out.

**Fewer than 12 million** people watched the trial’s opening day on Tuesday, compared with about 13 million who viewed the first day of impeachment hearings back in November. That was already a low bar to cross: Day 1 of those hearings drew _32 percent lower_ ratings than even James Comey’s uneventful Senate testimony in 2017.

**With each new hoax** , more Americans catch on and simply change the channel. During November’s sham “hearings,” for example, viewership dropped quickly as Democrats’ “star witnesses” offered no actual evidence to support impeachment. In fact, most of them had never even met President Trump. They just shared their opinions.

**Throwback Thursday:** [Joe Biden revisits his quid pro quo with Ukraine](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d81242b05b&e=3ee4985eea)

**This week** , Democrats’ impeachment managers were repeating themselves by hour two of their opening statements, if not sooner. It’s no mystery why. “They don’t have much to work with. That’s their entire problem right there,” Michael Goodwin writes for the _New York Post_.

**It turns out** if you don’t conduct a real investigation, and instead just call up friendly witnesses and orchestrate selective media leaks, you don’t have much to report. The American people aren’t stupid: If all they hear is repetitive partisan bluster instead of real facts and evidence, they stop listening.

**Of course** , there’s another reason for the monotony. Congressional Democrats’ push for impeachment didn’t start this week, or last fall, or even last summer. It started before President Trump even took the Oath of Office, more than 3 years ago:
* “‘Impeachment’ is already on the lips of pundits, newspaper editorials, constitutional scholars, and Congress,” [_Politico_ wrote](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=559c017814&e=3ee4985eea) on April 17, 2016.

* “The campaign to impeach President Trump has begun,” [_The Washington Post_ wrote](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7bfe6cbb5&e=3ee4985eea) 19 MINUTES after the President was sworn in.

* [Rep. Maxine Waters (D-CA) was chanting “impeach 45”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70de5380c6&e=3ee4985eea) during President Trump’s first year in office.

* Democrats’ first impeachment resolution came in the summer of 2017. The [next round of articles](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3bb1c6cf9&e=3ee4985eea) followed that November. . . and then again in December 2017, January 2018, March 2019, May 2019, and July 2019.

**Weaponizing impeachment** for partisan revenge is a terrible precedent for our country and future Presidents. The good news, at least, is that the American people aren’t falling for it.

[“Trump impeachment viewers turned off by TV rerun”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28dc97d24e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Across America:** ['Blah, blah, blah': Newark, Ohio, changes channel from impeachment to 'real stuff'](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89bc437a7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **One Trillion Trees: Conserving God’s creation**

**When** **President Trump** shared America’s economic comeback story at the World Economic Forum in Davos this week, he also had a big announcement in store.

**“Today, I’m pleased** to announce the United States will join One Trillion Trees Initiative being launched here at the World Economic Forum,” the President said. “And in doing so, we will continue to show strong leadership in restoring, growing, and better managing our trees and our forests.”

**President Trump:** [We’re committed to conserving God’s creation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=238e922451&e=3ee4985eea)

**America is entering** an age of energy dominance under President Trump. The United States is now the largest oil and natural gas producer in the world. Our energy exports have reached record highs. It turns out prosperity and conservation go hand-in-hand: During this energy revolution, U.S. emissions of all criteria pollutants _dropped_ between 2016 and 2018.

**“****I’m proud to report** the United States has among the cleanest air and drinking water on Earth — and we’re going to keep it that way,” the President said. “And we just came out with a report that, at this moment, it’s the cleanest it’s been in the last 40 years.”

[“Trump announces the US will join 1 trillion tree initiative”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45590b8f77&e=3ee4985eea)

**Learn more:** [World Economic Forum launches One Trillion Tree plan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3f67b98a7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump speaks at March for Life tomorrow!**

**President Trump** will make history tomorrow as he becomes the first President to speak at the March for Life rally. Each year, thousands of Americans come to Washington for the march, lending their voices in support of protecting life.

**“We are deeply honored** to welcome President Trump to the 47th annual March for Life,” the organization’s President, Jeanne Mancini, said in a statement.

**“From the appointment** of pro-life judges and federal workers, to cutting taxpayer funding for abortions here and abroad, to calling for an end to late-term abortions, President Trump and his Administration have been consistent champions for life and their support for the March for Life has been unwavering.”

[“VOUGHT: The Most Pro-Life President In History”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2422d1c8b1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
| **President Trump arrives at Joint Base Andrews **| January 23, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cca26a121e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e05474b693&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=26a13ac472)
---

---

name: Team Cory
subject: If you have ideas to share with us, we'd love to hear them!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Share your ideas with us as we get this re-election campaign off the ground. Team, It's only been _ten days_ since Cory announced he was running for re-election to the Senate. We want to make sure your input is heard as we get this campaign off the ground. Your ideas are so valuable to Cory and our entire team as we continue building an inclusive, grassroots movement that we can all be proud of. **[Will you take our critical new survey today and share your thoughts about which issues you'd like to hear emphasized in our campaign?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/january-issues-survey?source=em_su_20200123_TC_20200123-su-TC-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** If you have ideas to share about what you want our campaign to focus on (or just some words of encouragement), this is a great opportunity to have your voice heard. Not only will our staff see your responses, but we'll also be sharing them with Cory himself. **[Be one of the first supporters to complete our survey and let us hear your ideas about how we can secure a big win in November.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/january-issues-survey?source=em_su_20200123_TC_20200123-su-TC-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Hopefully, we'll see your name as one of our respondents. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. Team Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/january-issues-survey?source=em_su_20200123_TC_20200123-su-TC-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

---

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fcc/5fca0d19/7aae3005/291d3835/2368400869/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").

name: Jamiah, Tom Steyer for President
subject: Justice means...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Team — Last fall, Tom and his wife Kat Taylor sat enraptured at the Black Millennial Convention's Town Hall as young African American leaders spoke about criminal justice transformation. Tom was the only candidate to attend the event in person. He was also one of three candidates to show up at Justice Votes 2020, the first-ever candidate forum to be held inside Eastern State Penitentiary, a former prison in Philadelphia. That’s the thing about Tom — he shows up and he listens. clean_body: | | | | Team — Last fall, Tom and his wife Kat Taylor sat enraptured at the Black Millennial Convention's Town Hall as young African American leaders spoke about criminal justice transformation. Tom was the only candidate to attend the event in person. He was also one of three candidates to show up at Justice Votes 2020, the first-ever candidate forum to be held inside Eastern State Penitentiary, a former prison in Philadelphia. That’s the thing about Tom — he shows up and he listens. Prior to joining the campaign as the Director of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, I worked for organizations dedicated to advancing racial justice, including NAACP — the oldest civil rights organization in our country. My work was dedicated to crushing the school-to-prison pipeline, ending mass incarceration and cash bail, and forcing the Department of Justice to take action. I was encouraged and excited that my work helped inform Tom’s plan for the criminal justice system. Tom’s plan to tackle the lasting impact and legacy of racism reflects his devotion to what is right and his willingness to listen to people whose lives are destroyed by our broken system. My fight is also Tom’s fight. The Koch network has made an art out of buying elections with a few big checks and lots of cheap shots. That's their entire strategy.

We can't afford to let them buy this election in Minnesota, but that's exactly what will happen if we let them plow millions in to prop up their chosen candidates.

It can be frustrating. Believe us. But we need to stay focused at critical moments like these. When they pour money in to attack Tina in the coming months (it could happen!), we've got to do something about it -- ASAP.

**Add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to give us the resources we'll need to respond to the Koch network's war chest with a whole lot of grassroots support. This is important.**

subject: Breakfast with Devin Nunes

body:
| | | Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know that Congressman Devin Nunes will be joining us in Tulsa for breakfast on Friday, February 14th at 8AM. **As the former Chairman, and now ranking member, of the House Intelligence Committee, Congressman Nunes led fight against Adam Schiff’s impeachment scam and I am honored to have him join us.** [](https://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-chihhc-thfhtldii-y/) [If you would like to RSVP please click here.](https://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-chihhc-thfhtldii-j/) _Please note, location will be provided 7 days prior to event to all those who RSVP, so please be sure to include your correct email!_ **This is promising to be a great event, so don’t miss your chance to join Congressman Nunes and me.** As always, thank you for your continued support. I hope to see you on February 14th! Sincerely, Kevin P.S. If you have any questions, please contact sara@hernforcongress.com.

subject: March for Life
body:
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54171150:W7It3dvNI:m:1:2214761648:AC9173D0ADAD223722346560227A1056:r)

Dear Friends,

I am proud to announce that our campaign is the ONLY campaign to be endorsed by Oregon Right to Life PAC in the race for the 4th Congressional District of Oregon! This is an important endorsement because I feel that we NEED to stand up for our values. In this political climate we are often put down when we share our conservative beliefs.

Today, there is a national March for Life in Washington D.C. Thousands will turn out for this march, plus President Trump will speak. In honor of this national march and the Right To Life Endorsement, **I ask you stand against the far-left and[donate $50.00.](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54171151:W7It3dvNI:m:1:2214761648:AC9173D0ADAD223722346560227A1056:r)** Let's show them we are not willing to compromise our values.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54171151:W7It3dvNI:m:1:2214761648:AC9173D0ADAD223722346560227A1056:r)

Let's Go,

Alek Skarlatos

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Climate Change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
2010's the Hottest Decade on Record
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14233592/149003967/-1907457918?refcode=01202020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMyNDk2My1hZjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIfzKzy9t-32N-TuYziQIqdSYU7GPd5KTUomYhf6i4A=)
---
Dear Friend, Climate change is no longer a theoretical prediction. Whether it's historical flooding of our farms in the Midwest, increasing frequency and severity of devastating hurricanes, longer and deadlier wildfire seasons, regular tidal flooding of coastal cities, or the simple fact that the 2010's were the hottest decade on record, we are experiencing the impacts that climate scientists have been predicting for decades. The time to argue over the validity of the predictions is over. The time to act is now. As your Congressman, I would support a carbon dividend and fee policy like the one proposed by the Climate Leadership Council. I would also support aggressive research into other technology solutions like large scale carbon sequestration and explore the potential role nuclear energy might fill as a bridge to an all-renewable future. Of the fifteen candidates to be your next representative, only three of us even acknowledge the issue of climate change on our website - and one of those is a climate denier. If climate change and environmental protection are important to you, **[Chip in here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14233594/149003970/1282640063?refcode=em_poll_line012420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMyNDk2My1hZjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIfzKzy9t-32N-TuYziQIqdSYU7GPd5KTUomYhf6i4A=)** or hit one of the buttons below to help us get our message out. _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14233596/149003972/1282640063?refcode=012420_em_abx2&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMyNDk2My1hZjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIfzKzy9t-32N-TuYziQIqdSYU7GPd5KTUomYhf6i4A=)** | **[$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14233597/149003974/1282640063?refcode=01202420_em_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMyNDk2My1hZjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIfzKzy9t-32N-TuYziQIqdSYU7GPd5KTUomYhf6i4A=)** | **[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14233598/149003977/1282640063?refcode=01242020_em_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWMyNDk2My1hZjNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mIfzKzy9t-32N-TuYziQIqdSYU7GPd5KTUomYhf6i4A=)**

name: Team Stanton
subject: Did you hear Jon Favreau's new podcast?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**Pod Save America Host Jon Favreau released a new podcast where he ****spoke with voters _right here_ in suburban Maricopa County that supported Mitt Romney in 2012 and Hillary Clinton in 2016 to learn what Democrats will need to do to win in 2020.**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/3gb977ot0oCurMH9hKTjB7a5w63rQvBuqPlQXyNH2Ok=/WpctDJTiE7MWC0H2CWNEdWoFBzM8pXPEPgzNkBEjnCI=)

The message from these CRITICAL Maricopa County swing voters could not be any clearer -- they share our values and are ready to vote but we must make sure we are reaching out to as many as possible.

That's why we need to raise resources now so we can knock every single door in Maricopa County multiple times before November's election to get our message out if we want to win.

[**Will you chip in to Greg 's Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund, so we can knock the doors we need to win back Arizona and the Electoral College in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3gb977ot0oCurMH9hKTjB7a5w63rQvBuqPlQXyNH2Ok=/7hJFBHP1Gu6Vy1BeMpa9PzgE2wRPpc-GDV_aZXa9UvY=?refcode=X_012320_TOTVFund_N&amount=25&recurring=auto)

We're in a fight to make the government work for working people.

A fight to make big, structural change.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies. We can beat everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

**I'm so grateful to have you in this fight with me. But if we're going to win, this is the moment when we need to give it our all.**

**[I wouldn't ask if it wasn't powerfully important. Please give $2, or whatever you can, to help give our campaign the resources to compete before the Iowa caucuses. name: Senate Update
subject: The DeVos family is still trying to buy this Michigan Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat for our right-wing, Trump-backed opponent.

---
| |
---
**IMPORTANT UPDATE, friend: Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat for our right-wing Trump-backed opponent:**
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9b1/5721a3ed/700594f7/efb6034/2147745550/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNTgtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk258-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

**And guess what? It's _working_****. **A recent poll shows Gary **_TIED_** with his extremist opponent.
**With CBS reporting Senate control is riding on what happens here in Michigan, our fundraising is falling short. **We're only 89.8% of the way to our $36,400 goal - and we need to get there by midnight tonight.

**With just a few hours to go, Gary is counting on your immediate contribution to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats:**

name: Team Scholten
subject: New Hartford & Bronson & Ireton & Gowrie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

This month we’ve been on the road (snowstorms permitting) across Iowa’s 4th District, visiting towns of 1,000 people or less.

That’s because our campaign is committed to representing every community in our district, no matter how big or small.

**[Help us stay on the road all the way to election day -- chip in $5 or more today to keep J.D. out there, meeting voters and building momentum!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246479/149112096/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246480/149112097/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=) In New Hartford (pop. 492), we spoke candidly about the struggle to access affordable healthcare in our rural communities. Hearing folks open up about how difficult it is to stay healthy is heartbreaking -- everyone deserves access to quality healthcare providers, regardless of where they live.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246481/149112098/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

Bronson’s (pop. 319) town hall had a young attendee, Maggie, who is hoping to run for President one day. We're all inspired every day on the trail, especially when our young leaders are already getting engaged and involved in our democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246482/149112099/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

We’re also constantly impressed by the kindness of Iowans. With J.D. on the campaign trail, he hasn’t had time to fix a hole in his jacket -- so a supporter in Bronson helped out to make sure he keeps warm.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246483/149112100/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

Folks in Gowrie (pop. 1,037) showed up to talk about how they can come together and keep their local grocery store open. They aren’t alone in being a small community trying to figure out this problem to ensure that they still have fresh fruits and vegetables in town. Dollar stores and gas stations aren’t adequate replacements to grocery stores, and this is an issue that is not getting nearly enough attention in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246484/149112101/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

On a cold evening in Ireton (pop. 604), folks in the community huddled together to discuss getting money and special interests out of politics and enforcing antitrust policies. J.D. is passionate about enforcing antitrust policies so the little guy, everyday farms, and small businesses have a fighting chance.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246485/149112102/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

J.D. also got to meet one of his political heroes, activist Ady Barkan. People like Ady and J.D. are a new wave of leaders working towards improving access to and lowering the cost of healthcare.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246486/149112103/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)
---

This tour is about more than giving speeches or shaking as many hands as possible. It’s about listening to those who’ve been left behind by politics as usual in this country -- and about finding solutions to the problems faced by folks in rural America today.

**[Help us stay on the road to go to more schools, community centers, and legion halls: chip in $5 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246487/149112104/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)**

Thanks for your support!

\-- Team Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14246488/149112105/1710252956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZDI5ZS1kNzNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IHo24vbKvaFTyRUIrFTCodLp3c0VL5NcdYZu0l7kzF4=)

name: Mark Warner Survey Team
subject: New data: Republicans could win VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If you think that Virginia is now a true "blue" state, think again.
|
---
| | **Data shows Republicans could win Virginia in 2020.
Help us prevent that.** **[Take Mark 's strategy survey now](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d69a/53d9897e/53494164/1c89a17a/1826177131/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-2020strategy")** Derek --

**If you think that Virginia is now a true "blue" state, think again.** A recent battleground state poll shows President Trump winning Virginia in several different scenarios. Plus, the polling experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ rate Virginia as a battleground state with about as much chance of going for Republicans next November as for Democrats.

**We don 't need to lose sleep over this troubling news -- we need to get to work** building the strongest, Trump-proof, attack-resistant campaign we've ever had. **Will you help us do it by taking this short survey?** **[Take Mark 's strategy survey now](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d69a/53d9897e/53494164/1c89a17a/1826177131/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-2020strategy")** In 2014, Mark won reelection by less than 1%. Just one year after President Obama won Virginia in 2008, Bob McDonnell won back the Governor's mansion by a wide margin in 2009. Republicans maintained majorities in the Virginia General Assembly for the vast majority of the last ten years and held a majority of our US House seats until just 12 months ago. We don't enjoy thinking about those things but we have to, because **it could happen again.** Republicans are counting on it. The Trump Victory Initiative is well underway in the Commonwealth, plotting its 2020 take-back.

We can't afford to take any chances this year. **[Please help us guarantee that Mark can keep fighting for Virginians in the Senate.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d69a/53d9897e/53494164/1c89a17a/1826177131/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-2020strategy")**

Thank you,

Mark Warner Survey Team

| ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d69a/53d9897e/53494164/1c89a179/1826177131/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQyOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200124_s_1_fl__429__&refcode2=cont&amount=20")****
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

subject: I want to show your name to MJ

body:
Tomorrow is one of MJ's most critical debates in the Texas Democratic primary.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a14/2511099752/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | Pre-Debate Goal: **3,500 New Donors**
Progress: **2,836 New Donors**
Deadline: **SATURDAY**

Be one of the 664 donors we need to reach our goal!
**[Pitch in now>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a0b/2511099752/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200124.1nd__805__&amount=10")**
---
Hey Peter,

Tomorrow is one of MJ's most critical debates in the Texas Democratic primary. I hear MJ talk about her big ideas and inspiring vision for Texas all the time, so I'm 100% confident that she is going to blow everyone away when she takes the stage tomorrow.

But I want to be sure she knows just how many people are behind her before she goes up on stage. **[That's why I'm asking you to become one of the 664 new donors* we need to hit our goal -- so I can tell her 3,500 of you came together to say:](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a0b/2511099752/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200124.1nd__805__&amount=10") We're with you MJ!**

MJ is a combat veteran who went face to face with the Taliban and a working mom to two little kids. She has what it takes to nail this debate, win the primary, and defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

But with just **24 days between the debate and the start of early voting** \-- and with a LOT of undecided voters still out there -- we still need to spread MJ's message far and wide to ensure she's the candidate to take on and BEAT Sen. John Cornyn.

**And that's where you come in, Peter. Will you pitch in to show your support for MJ and make sure she's the candidate to go head to head with Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a08/2511099752/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200124.1nd__805__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a0f/2511099752/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200124.1nd__805__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648904f8/7f51f7bc/4ab0d5d0/4ef07a0e/2511099752/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debate-nd?refcode=email_20200124.1nd__805__")**
25 days until voting begins. We've got this if we're in it together!

Thanks,

Amanda Sherman
Communications Director

*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" 25 days until voting begins. We've got this if we're in it together! Thanks, Amanda Sherman Communications Director *If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update. "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. name: Impeachment Update (via algreen.org)
subject: We have a choice to make as a nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-FwLhLMqCshj5KOD_imAQqsJJUdXcDx1XCNY8Mk1xhQ=/Pm4zF_L1SiTg_1iCtQGBp2ILiqTORiJXhX3KKsY7s7c=?refcode=0124-impeachupdate)
---
Folks -- I wanted to check in with a brief update about this week's events. Since the beginning of the Senate impeachment trial, Republicans have stonewalled all attempts to subpoena the White House for documents regarding Ukraine and present additional witnesses who can also speak with authority on the President's actions. Republican Senators have proven they will go to any lengths to protect the President -- including withholding and obfuscating evidence. **But the truth will not stay hidden. We already know the President broke the law by withholding Congressionally-approved aid in exchange for damning information about a political opponent. We know he and his partners in crime invented wild lies to cover up his high crimes and misdemeanors -- because they knew their actions were illegal. ** Folks, we are at a crossroads in our nation's history. Our choice -- whether we choose accountability or blind partisan loyalty -- will be remembered for generations. I will continue to check in as the trial unfolds and will present more information as it becomes available. Thanks for standing on the side of justice, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-FwLhLMqCshj5KOD_imAQqsJJUdXcDx1XCNY8Mk1xhQ=/Pm4zF_L1SiTg_1iCtQGBp2ILiqTORiJXhX3KKsY7s7c=?refcode=0124-impeachupdate)**

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Extreme Republicans From Nashville To DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
It's only been two weeks since lawmakers made their way back to the Tennessee state Capitol and Republicans have already set forth an aggressively corrosive agenda targeting Tennessee's values and families. As mentioned last week, Tennessee Democrats have Republicans on the run. And now, rather than prioritizing the needs of children and families, Republicans are using their borrowed time to push unhelpful and damaging policies while they still can.
This week during the Senate Health and Wellness Committee, it was revealed $214 Million in federal funds earmarked to help low income families with childcare costs had been lost. Tennessee was only 1 of 2 states in the entire country which did not spend the "use it or lose it" funds. These dollars are our tax dollars that would come back to Tennessee and they were rejected by Republicans, just like the billions of dollars that would have kept 13 rural hospitals from closing and insured 300,000 hardworking Tennesseans.
Rather than addressing this issue, practicing oversight, and fulfilling the responsibility of the government, Republicans ignored what’s needed and instead pushed unnecessary legislation to further harm children.
How? Republican Senator Brian Kelsey of Shelby introduced a "right to work for less" amendment to the constitution. Tennessee’s “Right to Work” law has been on the books for over 70 years and is already damaging enough to working families. The Bureau of Labor Statistics' research shows workers in “right to work for less” states make $7,443 less per year than workers in states that allow the protection of workers and their families.It is unnecessary and meaningless to add it to the state constitution but Republicans won’t stop until “right to work for less” is part of our constitution, even if it means deploying draconian tactics.
To further Republican extremism , Governor Bill Lee decided to host his first press conference of 2020 to unveil an attack on women, their reproductive rights, and their ability to make important and difficult decisions for themselves and their families. No politician, should insert themselves in the middle of the decision to end a pregnancy, choose adoption, or raise a child. Those decisions must be left to a woman, her family and her faith, in consultation with her doctor or health care provider. Republicans were acting in the best interests of Tennessee women, workers, children and families, they’d work with Democrats to put forth real solutions to reduce the number of unintended pregnancies (like age-appropriate reproductive health education (including teaching abstinence) & access to affordable contraceptives & reproductive health) and figure out how we lost $214 Million Dollars that would have served Tennessee children and their families.
Standing with Tennessee families,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Tennessee Democratic Party Chair
TRUMP'S TRIAL MAY HINGE ON
TENNESSEE SENATOR LAMAR ALEXANDAR
The fate of the impeachment trial is in the hands of four Republicans Senators who could exercise their vote to demand witnesses appear. We must hold Tennessee's Senator Lamar Alexander accountable to the duties of his office and his oath to serve Tennessee. Call his office (202-224-4944) and demand he vote for witnesses.
INTERESTED IN RUNNING FOR OFFICE?
COME TO A TNDP TRAINING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/1.png]
TNDP events all across Tennessee! Learn how to run for office, learn about being a DNC convention delegate and join the TNDP Black Caucus at their messaging forum - all this month! Visit our events' page for a list of all events, and share with friends so you can make history together! [https://www.facebook.com/pg/tndem/events/]
BECOME A DNC DELEGATE
The deadline to apply to be DNC Delegate is less than 30 days away. Visit TNDP's website for more details. [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-delegate-selection-plan/]
We'll be hosting a series of workshops across the state to explain the process for becoming a delegate. R [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/?ref=bookmarks] egister for a Delegate Selection Workshop near you! [https://www.facebook.com/pg/tndem/events/]
MARSHA BLACKBURN SHOULD
BE CANCELED
During the Donald J. Trump impeachment hearings, when the elite group of elected U.S. Senators are to decide whether the values our country was founded on were compromised, Blackburn thought it was the proper time to catch up on her summer reading list. The impeachment of a president has only happened 2 other times during our country’s history. It’s a serious decision that must be made by the "world's greatest deliberative body" of which she is a part. A serious elected representative understands the gravity of her job and that accountability and personal responsibility are essential elements of character for a U.S. Senator. Sen. Blackburn’s behavior during the trial and her automatic response to being held accountable for it - she spent the afternoon harassing and attacking Purple Heart decorated Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman [https://www.cnn.com/2020/01/23/politics/marsha-blackburn-tweet-vindman-whistleblower/index.html?utm_medium=social&utm_term=link&utm_content=2020-01-24T02%3A57%3A06&utm_source=twCNNp] - shows personal responsibility isn’t really part of her brand."
TENNESSEE FARM BANKRUPTCIES
AT ALL TIME HIGH UNDER TRUMP
Due to broken promises, lies, and bad trade deals, Tennessee farms have suffered a great deal from Donald Trump. With bankruptcies being up 24% nationwide and 31% in Tennessee, farm families are bearing the pain for Trump's broken promises.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/EIyDsEeWoAAib84.jpg]
To further the damage done, Trump is trying to claim credit for a “phase one” China trade agreement. Trump’s trade deal accomplishes next to none of his original objectives and does not alleviate the billions of dollars in costs to American businesses and consumers that his policies with China have already caused. Trump’s “phase one” China trade deal falls far short of the promises he made to farmers, and it won’t make up for billions of dollars in lost exports, bankrupt farms, and disrupted supply chains.
DIG2020 - WE DID IT!
Ya'll Rock and now I guess I'll rock too! We reached our $6,000 goal in half the time we thought we would. We can now access and harness data for elections across Tennessee. Thank you to each and every one of our contributors. We could not have done this without you. As promised, I'll record my karaoke performance and share it with ya'll in next week's newsletter.
The fundraising does not stop here, though. We still need to recruit candidates, support county parties, and educate voters. As the past two weeks have shown in Washington DC and Nashville, Republicans are merciless. Every donation helps us win elections and fight back.

clean_body: It's only been two weeks since lawmakers made their way back to the Tennessee state Capitol and Republicans have already set forth an aggressively corrosive agenda targeting Tennessee's values and families. As mentioned last week, Tennessee Democrats have Republicans on the run. And now, rather than prioritizing the needs of children and families, Republicans are using their borrowed time to push unhelpful and damaging policies while they still can. This week during the Senate Health and Wellness Committee, it was revealed $214 Million in federal funds earmarked to help low income families with childcare costs had been lost. Tennessee was only 1 of 2 states in the entire country which did not spend the "use it or lose it" funds. These dollars are our tax dollars that would come back to Tennessee and they were rejected by Republicans, just like the billions of dollars that would have kept 13 rural hospitals from closing and insured 300,000 hardworking Tennesseans. Rather than addressing this issue, practicing oversight, and fulfilling the responsibility of the government, Republicans ignored what’s needed and instead pushed unnecessary legislation to further harm children. How? Republican Senator Brian Kelsey of Shelby introduced a "right to work for less" amendment to the constitution. Tennessee’s “Right to Work” law has been on the books for over 70 years and is already damaging enough to working families. The Bureau of Labor Statistics' research shows workers in “right to work for less” states make $7,443 less per year than workers in states that allow the protection of workers and their families.It is unnecessary and meaningless to add it to the state constitution but Republicans won’t stop until “right to work for less” is part of our constitution, even if it means deploying draconian tactics. To further Republican extremism , Governor Bill Lee decided to host his first press conference of 2020 to unveil an attack on women, their reproductive rights, and their ability to make important and difficult decisions for themselves and their families. No politician, should insert themselves in the middle of the decision to end a pregnancy, choose adoption, or raise a child. Those decisions must be left to a woman, her family and her faith, in consultation with her doctor or health care provider. Republicans were acting in the best interests of Tennessee women, workers, children and families, they’d work with Democrats to put forth real solutions to reduce the number of unintended pregnancies (like age-appropriate reproductive health education (including teaching abstinence) & access to affordable contraceptives & reproductive health) and figure out how we lost $214 Million Dollars that would have served Tennessee children and their families. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Is Trump really as popular as he says?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, According to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, pollsters may be overstating Trump's popularity at 42% job approval because they aren't factoring increased polarization into their questions. When they do, his relative approval rating drops even further. Some polling is even placing him as low as 37%. Yet they also found that despite Trump's low nationwide popularity, Republican voters are unmoved and rank him second only to Reagan in terms of favorability. With all of the news coming out of the Senate trial and given these conflicting results, we need to hear directly from you today: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8c/6e9863e8/80c208c/1db056be/1655105444/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/G3h9glfl") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8c/6e9863e8/80c208c/1db056be/1655105444/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/G3h9glfl") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8c/6e9863e8/80c208c/1db056be/1655105444/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/G3h9glfl")

Tell us why you're supporting Mike today and you'll be entered to win!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=20dd811bff&e=f54746ec54)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schumer Whiffs Impeachment
body:
"An old Beltway joke is that the most dangerous place in Washington is between Chuck Schumer and a TV camera." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34e51a5a8d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schumer Whiffs Impeachment**

“An old Beltway joke is that the most dangerous place in Washington is between Chuck Schumer and a TV camera. After Week One of the Trump impeachment trial, that deserves modification: The most dangerous place for Democrats _is _Chuck Schumer in front of a TV camera,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“In fairness, Mr. Schumer was handed the weakest impeachment case in U.S. history. He began this exercise facing 53 Republican senators who spent months watching the most liberal House Democrats use secret hearings, leaked transcripts and strong-arm tactics to produce two vague and legally dubious articles of impeachment.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70764f8ec6&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
| Democrats are demanding new documents and witnesses for the Senate trial—“even ones Democrats didn’t call for in the House. Democrats don’t seem to realize that they’re complaining that their own articles of impeachment are flimsy, lacking in substance, and failing to sway the American people or any objective senators,” Rep. Steve Scalise (R-LA) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22f091ed0a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Millions of Americans are already changing the channel on impeachment—literally. According to Nielsen data, as Democrats began making their arguments Wednesday, ratings plummeted by 19 percent and lost over 2 million TV viewers from Tuesday’s procedural debates, Helen Coster reports for [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b994ce2d26&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Americans' confidence in the U.S. economy is higher than at any point in about two decades.” The surging optimism “likely reflects the U.S. unemployment rate's continued stay at a 50-year low. Meanwhile, the Dow Jones Industrial Average continues to reach record highs -- and flirts with reaching the 30,000 marker,” Justin McCarthy writes for [_Gallup_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d11ca83287&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “‘Never Again.’ That is the vow United States Vice President Mike Pence made Thursday while speaking at the 5th annual World Holocaust Forum at Yad Vashem in Jerusalem. Standing with him were more than 40 senior world leaders and heads of state, each of them there to commemorate the day the gates of Auschwitz were torn down and to pledge to never allow another Holocaust to happen again,” Emily Jones reports for [CBN News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61b7c37a52&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=377abe0abd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6218b5dab1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4d59264ec5)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Two
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There are two options in this election and I'm asking you to choose the first one.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200124-eom2?refcode=em200124-eom2&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") There are two options in this election, folks:

**Option #1:** We do whatever it takes to save Minnesota's Senate seat and make sure Democrats can flip the majority in November.

**Option #2:** We sit on our hands, watch our momentum dwindle, and risk losing.

**I'm asking you to choose the first option and make a contribution toward our very first monthly fundraising goal of 2020. name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: I’m pleading with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio
body:
The Establishment is desperate to keep me out of office because they know my tough-as-nails attitude will get the job done! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176200:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)
---
N/A,

If there's one thing I've been guilty of in my career in public service - it's giving it to the American people straight.

This is a big moment for my campaign and if **I'm being frank** , **I'm starting to feel the heat.**

**[In one week, I will be facing a major January fundraising deadline and if I can't raise $25,000 in order to reach my goal-](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176200:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)** I don't see how I can win this race.

I'm _pleading_ you, please don't let that happen. **[N/A, will you pitch in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help me stave off the Left's desperate efforts to keep me out of this race?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176201:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)**

| [ Beat the Heat ⇒ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176202:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)
---

Since I launched my re-election efforts I have been ruthlessly attacked by the Radical Left and even had weak-kneed RINO's ***cough*** __Jeff Flake__ ***cough*** contribute to my opponents' campaign.

You see, the Establishment is desperate to keep me out of office because they know my tough-as-nails attitude is exactly what this country needs to get the job done.

Through it all - the personal attacks on me and my family, the phony charges - it's only because of grassroots conservative supporters like you that I'm able to persevere.

N/A, I still need to raise $25,000 before the end of the month. **[Can I count on your support one more time?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176200:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

[ Beat the Heat ⇒ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/54176202:WchYFdvuN:m:1:2105898951:76D93C3E54C9B145DD6362A59EC7A9AF:r)
---

| Paid for by Re-Elect Sheriff Joe Arpaio

body:

| | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639028c/55b66746/224275d1/80f8d4b/5912995/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/the-care-you-need/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-the-care-you-need-email") At a town hall in Lowell, Joe was asked an emotional question about health care coverage in America - this was his response: **"As the richest most powerful nation in the world, we can provide access to care for everybody.** The basic premise here is that your granddaughter should get the health care she needs when she needs it. Your daughter should get the health care she needs when she needs it. You should get the health care you need when you need it. Your parents should get the health care they need when they need it. **And everybody in this room should get the health care they need when they need it.** That's not the reality. _So let's fix it."_ **If you agree with Joe, sign your name now.** **[Tell Congress: "In the wealthiest nation in the world, everybody should get the health care they need when they need it." We need health care for all. We need Medicare for All.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639028c/55b66746/224275d1/80f8d4b/5912995/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/the-care-you-need/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-the-care-you-need-email") ** [I AGREE WITH JOE](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639028c/55b66746/224275d1/80f8d4b/5912995/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/the-care-you-need/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-01-the-care-you-need-email") We deserve better, so let's fight for it. - Team Kennedy |

name: Team Markey
subject: We started strong, but then it slowed down. Can you help us pick up the pace?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
At the beginning of January, we were off to a strong start. This team was stepping up in a big way right when we needed to kick things up a notch.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de46/693b8b0a/435d992e/72de4937/4186580723/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
We need to be honest with you today. We're at risk of falling short of our goal this month.
At the beginning of January, we were off to a strong start. This team was stepping up in a big way right when we needed to kick things up a notch.
But then it slowed down. Now we've fallen behind where we need to be at this point. That's okay because there's still time to make up the difference before the end of the month.
But we need your help if we're going to get there.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to help us pick up the pace before our January deadline? Winning this race is going to take all of us stepping up and working together.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de46/693b8b0a/435d992e/72de4936/4186580723/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjQtYjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200124-b2")**
Ed's facing his toughest race ever this year. That means there's no time to slow down. What we do in these early days of 2020 will lay the foundation for whether we win or lose.
Thank you for all you do.
Team Markey
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de46/693b8b0a/435d992e/72de4936/4186580723/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjQtYjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200124-b2")**

* * *

name: Team Collins
subject: Emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Susan has and continues to be a voice of reason that we can ALWAYS count on. But right now, she needs to know if she can count on us.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE2MTcwOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjIzNDA1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE2MTcwOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjIzNDA1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Peter,
Susan has and continues to be a voice of reason that we can ALWAYS count on. But right now, she needs to know if she can count on us.
As we type this, Democrats are ramping up their efforts to see Susan defeated. Millions of outside dollars are being poured into Maine to slander her name and completely vilify Susan. We need your help to fight back.
**As of a few minutes ago we were still $135,000 short of our January goal.**

body:
Everything we've built over the past year, and everything we will continue to build in 2020, is thanks to grassroots donors, volunteers, and supporters like you who are committed to this movement... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e110eb/444025918/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
February marks the one-year anniversary of Elizabeth's campaign launch in Lawrence, Massachusetts.

Everything we've built over the past year -- and everything we will continue to build in 2020 -- is thanks to grassroots donors, volunteers, and supporters like you who have poured your heart into this movement.

I've included a short memo below sharing our roadmap to victory. But before we dive into the details, I wanted to take a moment to share a big announcement:

**As of yesterday, we received our 3 millionth grassroots contribution to our campaign, making Elizabeth the fastest first-time candidate to hit this milestone.** I'm deeply grateful for every supporter who chipped in to own a piece of our grassroots movement for big, structural change. Thank you.

But we're only just getting started. Keep reading to learn more about our plan to win the nomination, defeat Donald Trump, take back the Senate, hold the House, and flip critical state legislative chambers in 2020.

**[One last quick and important plug: Grassroots supporters are the only people who make this plan to victory possible. If you're ready to dream big, fight hard, and win, it's up to you to chip in and keep growing our movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e110ed/444025918/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xVUZfTU1PX1NUUl9RXzIwMjAwMTI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P")**
