>
Thanks for everything, and hope to see you on the road. -roger

Roger Lau
Campaign Manager
Warren for President

** _OUR ROADMAP TO WIN_**

To win the Democratic nomination, we will organize nationwide, in all 50 states, D.C., and the five territories that send delegates to the Democratic convention. Your support has made it possible to build a robust organizing program across the country, including person-to-person conversations at voters' doors and highly-tailored phone calls, texts, digital media, and traditional media.

Our immediate goal is to secure the close to 2,000 delegates necessary to win the Democratic nomination. For the last 13 months we have built and executed our plan to win. We expect this to be a long nomination fight and have built our campaign to sustain well past Super Tuesday and stay resilient no matter what breathless media narratives come when voting begins.

But winning the nomination is not all we need to do. Our campaign, and Elizabeth Warren's candidacy, has never been only about winning the presidency. Our dreams have to be much bigger if we're going to make big, structural change a reality in 2021. So in 2020, we aim to:
* Win the Democratic nomination by securing close to 2,000 delegates
* Defeat Donald Trump soundly in the Electoral College and the popular vote
* Take back the U.S. Senate
* Expand the Democratic majority in the U.S. House
* Flip control in critical state legislative chambers to fight off GOP-led state legislation, win key reforms on a state level, and set ourselves up for congressional redistricting in 2021
* Build a movement that will apply the relentless outside pressure on Washington in 2021 to achieve the big, structural changes we need

**Here's how we'll get there:**

When Elizabeth launched her campaign a year ago, she made a decision to spend zero time with wealthy donors and instead use that time to meet with as many voters as possible. Since then, **she's traveled to 30 states and Puerto Rico** , including typically red states like West Virginia and Mississippi, that often get overlooked in the Democratic primary.

As she's traveled, Elizabeth has sparked grassroots enthusiasm across the country, in every corner of our party, jumpstarting our organization and giving us a critical advantage in building out a national campaign. Elizabeth has done public events in more states than any other presidential candidate, taken more unfiltered questions from the public and the press than any other candidate, and had more than **100,000 one-on-one conversations** with Americans along the way.

Since last spring, we've had a robust staff footprint in the four earliest voting states, including what even rival campaigns acknowledge is the best organization on the ground, and matching or exceeding our opponents with **more than 1,000 staff on the ground nationwide in 31 states and Washington, D.C.**

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e11dd3/444025918/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI0NTcwNTY0IiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjFVRl9NTU9fU1RSX1FfMjAyMDAxMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://mi.elizabethwarren.com/p/cp/04c58ef4b6faab98/c?mi_u=4570564&mi_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmi.elizabethwarren.com%2Fp%2Frp%2F58ab1b81e2a880fa%2Furl")

**EARLY STATES**

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e11ddb/444025918/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI0NTcwNTY0IiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjFVRl9NTU9fU1RSX1FfMjAyMDAxMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://mi.elizabethwarren.com/p/cp/04c58ef4b6faab98/c?mi_u=4570564&mi_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmi.elizabethwarren.com%2Fp%2Frp%2Fa36f9091eb7a267d%2Furl")
The four early states contests are just the beginning. The following is our roadmap for building an organization that will not just win the Democratic nomination, but also take back the Senate, hold the House, and flip critical state legislative chambers as we head into 2021.

**SUPER TUESDAY AND BEYOND**

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e11ddd/444025918/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI0NTcwNTY0IiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjFVRl9NTU9fU1RSX1FfMjAyMDAxMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://mi.elizabethwarren.com/p/cp/04c58ef4b6faab98/c?mi_u=4570564&mi_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmi.elizabethwarren.com%2Fp%2Frp%2F58f223adada8e337%2Furl")
Starting last fall, we began putting staff on the ground in critical Super Tuesday states like California and Virginia, talking with voters and building support for Elizabeth Warren's candidacy.

Of this staff, **more than 80% are directly focused on grassroots organizing** , joining our growing volunteer leader groups across the country.

We know how valuable direct voter contact is, so we've focused on creating in-person volunteer opportunities in these critical states. We now have **more than 100 field offices** open across the country. To date, supporters in Super Tuesday states have taken **millions of concrete actions** , and each week marks a new high in the number of people organizing.

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e11ddc/444025918/VEsFBQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI0NTcwNTY0IiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjFVRl9NTU9fU1RSX1FfMjAyMDAxMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://mi.elizabethwarren.com/p/cp/04c58ef4b6faab98/c?mi_u=4570564&mi_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmi.elizabethwarren.com%2Fp%2Frp%2Fb76b724821f432e2%2Furl")
We knew that this primary process was never going to be easy. We also know that you can't just stand up an organization overnight or buy your way to the nomination. While billionaires may be able to buy their way into the conversation, it will be a broad, grassroots effort and organization that delivers the Democratic nomination.

That's why, since day one, we've been engaging volunteers and potential supporters where they are -- empowering them to start organizing well before we've had any staff on the ground in a given state. As staff have arrived, they've worked hand in hand to support our volunteers who continue to build out our organization in their state. Our campaign believes that staff exist to serve the volunteers who are the beating heart of our organization, and that everyone working together makes the difference between winning and losing.

To that end, we've also been building out our presence in the states that vote between Super Tuesday and the beginning of April. From Alabama to Washington State, we have **several hundred organizing staffers** in states that vote between Super Tuesday and the first week in April. And by mid-April, we will have organizers on the ground in the remaining states, completing the full map.

[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e11ddc/444025918/VEsFBA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI0NTcwNTY0IiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjFVRl9NTU9fU1RSX1FfMjAyMDAxMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "http://mi.elizabethwarren.com/p/cp/04c58ef4b6faab98/c?mi_u=4570564&mi_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P&url=http%3A%2F%2Fmi.elizabethwarren.com%2Fp%2Frp%2Fb76b724821f432e2%2Furl")
As the primary moves towards the convention in July, **we will be organizing in all 57 states and territories.**

This later period includes critical states for the general election like Pennsylvania, where the organization we build during the primary process will help lift organizational efforts for the ticket up and down the ballot in November.

**SETTING THE TABLE FOR THE GENERAL ELECTION**

Primaries and caucuses through every state and territory offer a grassroots campaign like ours the chance to build capacity for the general election and beyond. There are three important ways this matters.

First: Donald Trump is in office, despite getting millions fewer votes, because of the particulars of the Electoral College. That broken, undemocratic system shouldn't be how we pick our presidents. Elizabeth Warren intends to be the last president chosen by the Electoral College -- she supports replacing it with a national popular vote and will fight to get that passed. **But in 2020, our top goal is building a critical mass of support in more than enough states to foreclose any path to an Electoral College victory for Donald Trump.** (That's on top of denying him the popular vote for a second time so that when he's defeated, he'll join John Quincy Adams and Benjamin Harrison as a one-term president who lost the popular vote on the way in and lost it again, even more badly, on the way out.)

This means that as we build our campaign to win delegates in every state and territory to secure the Democratic nomination, we're doing it with an eye towards sustaining it through the general election. **For instance, after the very first contest, we will keep staff on the ground and offices open in Iowa.** For states that will be part of Elizabeth Warren's path to victory in the Electoral College, it's especially critical that we don't lose momentum or stall the infrastructure after the primary has passed when we have a chance to keep building for the even bigger contest in November.

Second: Beyond their role in the Electoral College or helping to turn out voters in the presidential battleground states, every supporter in every state and territory matters because of the critical work that must be done for the entire Democratic ticket. **It doesn't matter whether your state is "solid" red or blue for the presidential vote, or your Senate race or Congressional district is "safe" Democratic or Republican.** Besides helping the top of the ticket by calling or texting or traveling to knock on doors in presidential battleground states, when Elizabeth Warren is the Democratic nominee and the leader of our party, every person who shares our hopes for the future of this country will be asked to invest their time and money in the broader Democratic ticket.

That means finding other races that aren't quite as "safe", or candidates with a particular story or set of plans that inspire you -- and spending as much time and energy as possible making this extraordinary moment in history matter for the outcome of that race, too. This defining time in our history has inspired so many extraordinary people to run for office at every level of government. We need to have their backs. Our national organizing effort will work with state and local parties to make sure every interested volunteer has urgent, meaningful ways to help, no matter where they live.

Third: This big, broad grassroots movement will be critical to how President Elizabeth Warren gets big, structural change done once she's elected. **People across the country united around a bold, popular agenda and passionate about what they want to get done will be key to holding elected officials everywhere, no matter what party affiliation, accountable to their constituents.** Elizabeth Warren aims to make Election Day in November not the end of a campaign, but rather the kickoff of an unprecedented grassroots mobilization to make our economy and our government truly work for the people.

**HOW YOU CAN YOU HELP**

The only way we can stop the wealthy and well-connected from buying elections is with a grassroots movement that simply says: Enough.

These are powerful interests we're up against, and it will take every ounce of courage and persistence we have to get this done. But we know a thing or two about that. It means organizing in every community across this country, talking with our friends and neighbors about why Elizabeth Warren is the best candidate to win the Democratic nomination and the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump.

And we have no doubt whether Elizabeth can beat Trump: She's not only undefeated in running for office, but she's the only presidential candidate who's beaten a Republican incumbent in the past 30 years.

I encourage you to text WIN to 24477 in order to be connected with a grassroots organizer in your part of the country as we join together to win this nomination.

Together this movement -- your movement -- is going to get this thing done.

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a76a/45c30650/1e1f38ec3/66e110ed/444025918/VEsFBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xVUZfTU1PX1NUUl9RXzIwMjAwMTI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1UF_MMO_STR_Q_20200124_V1S3_P")

I'm deeply grateful for every supporter who chipped in to own a piece of our grassroots movement for big, structural change. Thank you. But we're only just getting started. subject: Citizens United OVERTURNED?!

body:
Before midnight, will you add your name to OVERTURN Citizens United and BAN dark money in our politics forever? We need 1,000,000 signatures strong before midnight tonight. >>
---
| | [_**Americans mark 10 years of shameful Citizens United ruling with HISTORIC opposition. Before this week 's anniversary ends, join one MILLION in adding your name to OVERTURN Citizens United. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB") | [**ONE-QUESTION DARK MONEY POLL FOR DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM:**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB") Americans are marking the 10-year anniversary of Citizens United by rising up to OVERTURN this shameful ruling. Please add your voice for this milestone anniversary. [**Do you want to see Citizens United OVERTURNED and dark money BANNED?**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB") [**YES!! >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB")** **[No](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB")****
---

We just hit the 10-year anniversary of the disastrous Citizens United ruling.

**Americans nationwide are marking this shameful anniversary by rising up to ensure we NEVER celebrate another one. **

Look -- we're now facing the most critical election of our entire lives.

We CANNOT let Republicans' endless dark money steal our victory.

This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to strike and END Citizens United forever.

[_**Before midnight, will you add your name to OVERTURN Citizens United and BAN dark money in our politics forever? We need 1,000,000 signatures strong before midnight tonight. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b716/18e32a7f/51629e7f/7b2263b8/149637338/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/CU-anniversary-2020?source=Lujan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-Lujan-AB")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

body:
We have come a long way from the early days when only a handful of Democratic members of Congress were willing to call for this President’s impeachment. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BwE/ni0YAA/t.2yo/hDvNqmJiRjuDMiP1lL81Kg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PxMeiPCgRNhXUv8gQ7zwIy5YIIbTsBvR5n3two8GJApJJuzpqrBlelNMy5gqEbaK9NhDDYK1uBMbLJ6gPxNxtw-2BLYksqDd80QBsM4IX9Fy5Rh1OuZYdFxzKYmbwdSQ9p40-3D/TlE7)
Friend, **** **** **** We have come a long way from the early days when only a handful of Democratic members of Congress were willing to call for this President’s impeachment. One of the reasons I got in this race was because I was so frustrated that Democratic leadership wasn’t acting with the type of urgency required to hold this President accountable for his rampant corruption. Now we have finally impeached this President, yet Mitch McConnell refuses to call witnesses and hold a fair trial in the Senate. In America, no one is above the law and that includes this President. We need to call on Republicans in the Senate to do the right thing and to allow a fair trial so that we can put this President’s crimes front and center for all Americans to see.
When I’m in Congress, you can always count on me to do what’s right even when it’s not politically popular or expedient. **_[Can you make a donation today to get us across the finish line and elect someone who will always do what’s right for the residents of New York’s 17th Congressional District?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BwE/ni0YAA/t.2yo/hDvNqmJiRjuDMiP1lL81Kg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsdIBYCd-2Fcj23Hb5OmB5Ox9TP1rZAL7eCj2-2BuFnFCy8ll4NUypWtVUqqvLBOqn4ZNw-2F3UG73Hw4CLzZbmo15pHU2o6MkoNKKAb-2BzR5UxEpDuqAb7Aof2KrGKAD7uQ3hszimDXbStc5a6bHKZXToB8EHDFXQSMslCj5Su4MCxYL7dvZ0CZyZo5LfCtuPJHJyyvSXsUiFLEt8MQEugV2bMkD/exIe)_** **

name: Earletta Hearn =?utf-8?b?KENoYXJsZXPigJk=?= mom)
subject: new blood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY, LTD
body:
|
---
Hi there, When my son, Charles, was growing up, I knew he’d end up doing something powerful. At 3 years old, he told me he wanted to be a lawyer. When he applied to law school, I knew he’d get in because our faith had gotten us through so many challenges together already. When Charles was in law school, people told him he didn’t belong there. I told him that when people try to tell you what you can’t do, you show them what you’re capable of. And he did. That’s because he’d already seen what he could do despite the struggles he faced during his childhood. There were times when I would skip meals so he could eat. At one point, we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned down — but we kept moving forward. We did the best with what we had, but Charles always understood that there was a better way. As rich as the United States is, there are certain things that every person should have to lead a healthy life, like healthcare and a basic minimum income. Charles is ready to represent Kentuckians in the U.S. Senate because he’s lived through the real struggles other politicians just talk about. He knows that to get something different, you have to do something different. Kentucky needs new blood. That’s Charles — the blood that will run through the veins of Kentucky and bring new life. **_****_**[If you agree, will you chip in $5 or more to support my son’s campaign? He’s working toward a $15,000 end-of-month goal, and support from people like you is how we’ll stay on track and finally defeat Mitch McConnell.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14253536/149178290/2072759943?refcode=cb2020124ndb_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM4MTY5Mi1mNDNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vNhP2qNkXWNBfF6s_oRd_kc-eNYjzw0-0l4sMi_PCMU=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14253537/149178291/2072759943?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=cb2020124ndb-AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM4MTY5Mi1mNDNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vNhP2qNkXWNBfF6s_oRd_kc-eNYjzw0-0l4sMi_PCMU=)******

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ORTT TO RECEIVE CONSERVATIVE PARTY AWARD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **ORTT TO RECEIVE CONSERVATIVE PARTY AWARD**
_A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_
Niagara County, NY --- On Monday, January 27, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, U.S. Army combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District will be honored by the New York State Conservative Party at its annual convention in Albany. Ortt will receive the “Legislative Scorecard Award,” based on his 100 percent conservative voting record on legislation in 2019. Ortt pointed to his steadfast commitment to protecting the conservative values of New York’s residents.

“New York’s 27th Congressional District needs a conservative, battle-tested patriot representing them in Congress and helping push back against the progressive radicals emerging from the left,” said Ortt. “I’m honored to be recognized by the New York State Conservative Party and thank its members for the support and guidance they have provided me over the years. Being a conservative in New York State is no easy task. We have a governor who would rather throw us out of the state than accept our differences, which is the same attitude you will see in Washington should liberals succeed. We need a fighter in Congress standing beside President Trump to help enact our conservative agenda and make America great again.”

While serving in the Senate, Ortt has fought back against the regressive ideology of the New York City liberal elites and brazenly vocal Democratic Socialists. He has advocated for veterans and military families while also protecting the sanctity of life and has pushed back against extreme social policies such as New York’s “Abortion on Demand” law. Ortt is also the only candidate in the race for NY-27 to receive an “A” rating from the New York State Rifle and Pistol Association (NYSRPA), following years of top ratings and support from NYSRPA and the National Rifle Association.

“Being conservative is more than saying you’re a conservative or filling out a questionnaire,” said Ortt. “It means showing your conservative values and fighting spirit when our state, our freedoms, and our values are under attack.”

Since joining the New York State Legislature, Ortt has been consistently ranked as one of the most conservative legislators, receiving the top conservative rating in three of his five years of service.
###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

subject: ❌ West Virginia, we hear you loud and clear.
body:
The richest man in West Virginia only looks out for number one.
We've confirmed what West Virginians already know, team:
It’s time to fight back, but we need your help to build our campaign and take Justice down in November. [**Pitch in $25 to keep our momentum to fight for West Virginia moving forward!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14254222/149187665/2023015563?refcode=em_eom1_012420_link1&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGVkNGM3My1mODNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPwUq07XLAxGcrSsPEGBP5knPDNR3eGWddJHddHzl_8=)
**Let’s look at the facts:**
\- Jim Justice claims to be an expert businessman, **but he owes millions in taxes and fines.**
\- Justice claims he’s fixing our roads and infrastructure, **but the majority of West Virginians are NOT HAPPY with the condition of the roads.**
\- Justice says he has empathy for working families, but as the richest man in West Virginia he inherited his business from his daddy. **He doesn't have a clue what we go through just to make ends meet.**
Working West Virginia families can’t wait another four years for change. West Virginians deserve a governor who understands the issues they face and knows how to fix them, not a billionaire born with a silver spoon in his mouth.
I am dedicated to moving West Virginia forward by prioritizing investments in public education, creating more jobs in the Mountain State, protecting health care, fixing the roads, and combating the opioid epidemic. I will always put West Virginia’s working families first - **but I need your help to take on the richest man in West Virginia. Because Jim Justice doesn’t pay his bills, he has a lot of extra cash to fund his campaign.**
We need to reach 500 donors before our fundraising deadline in a few days - help us send a message to Jim Justice.
[**Pitch in $25 or whatever you can to help us put working West Virginians first again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14254223/149187666/2023015563?refcode=em_eom1_012420_link2&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGVkNGM3My1mODNlLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPwUq07XLAxGcrSsPEGBP5knPDNR3eGWddJHddHzl_8=)
Let’s do this,
Ben Salango
Ben Salango for WV

clean_body: This week marked the 47th anniversary of Roe. v. Wade, and it goes without saying that this was one of the most unjust decisions in U.S. Judicial history. This decision allowed for the most innocent among us the be murdered before they could speak for themselves. This is the simplest way to put it, but Kendra Horn and her allies over at Planned Parenthood don’t want you to know that. With millions of Americans I pray for the day when the sanctity of every human life is protected. With your help, we can make that a reality. We can put an end to Kendra Horn’s cozy relationship with abortionists like Planned Parenthood. But first we need to win this race. Will you donate to Team Hill today to help make this happen? Patriots like you and I know that we can make a difference. And if we continue to work together, we can help President Trump make America’s judicial system great again! Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/47dfe1ae2d5b/only-candidate-endorsed-by-texas-right-to-life?e=52e38a8253)
---
| |

| | Friends,

Our campaign has received two more major endorsements, and I am honored to share them with you.

**The Central Texas Republican Assembly** released their endorsement with a quote from a District 17 CRTA member saying, “Texans can trust George Hindman to back up his promises with action and a conservative voting record. George is a rocket scientist and grassroots activist, not a career politician. He will represent us, not special interests, in DC.”

Additionally, I am the only candidate in this race endorsed by**Texas Right to Life** , the most influential pro-life group in Texas. They know I will always stand up for life. No matter what. You have my promise to fight the DC abortion lobby every time they ask for more money to end the lives of babies.

My team and I are working hard to spread the message of defending our country’s bedrock principles and standing strong for our conservative Republican values. We will continue to blaze the campaign trial and earn every vote!

Please consider [donating to our campaign](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=948c7a9669&e=52e38a8253) and helping us get across the finish line. Whether it is a donation of [$25, $50, or $100,](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=9b35edc37c&e=52e38a8253) every dollar counts!

Thank you for you support,

-George

| Peter,
The campaign had another busy week and wanted to send you just a quick update of what has been going on in the campaign.
We started the week out at the Garland MLK Parade, the March for Life Parade, and did some great block walking in Garland.
Then, I was honored to receive the endorsement of former Congressman Sam Johnson. He is someone I respect and admire, and having his endorsement in this race really means a lot to me.

name: Mike Turner
subject: Your priorities are my priorities in Congress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDE2MTg0MjYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY4MjI0MTQyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Your priorities are my priorities in Congress.

As your representative, it’s important for me to know what issues matter most to you. That’s why my team has created an Ohio Priorities survey.

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE2MTg0MjYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjI0MTQyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

As your representative, it’s important for me to know what issues matter most to you. That’s why my team has created an Ohio Priorities survey.

By taking the Ohio Priorities survey today, you will be giving me and my team a better understanding of your priorities.

The results of this survey are important. It will help me prioritize issues of importance based on what individuals like you find the most pressing and urgent.

Take the survey here>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE2MTg0MjYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjI0MTQyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Ohioans are facing difficult challenges every day and need results from Congress. Whether it be addressing the opioid epidemic, restoring pensions for local retirees, and protecting jobs here locally... There are important issues that need to be prioritized. Please take my Ohio Priorities survey, so that I can better work for you in 2020. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE2MTg0MjYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjI0MTQyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Take the Ohio Priorities survey today!>>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE2MTg0MjYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MjI0MTQyMQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you,

Mike Turner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Education that every child deserves.
body:
Hi Marc Flores for Congress,
Education is the key to all opportunity, and we owe it to our children to give them every opportunity to succeed.

It is inexcusable that some schools in our community struggle to provide the education that every child deserves.

Today, there remains one school in District 18 that potentially may be shut down due to being deemed "Improvement Required" (IR). This is unacceptable.

We need to provide adequate funding to all of our schools so they can hire good teachers, provide quality support from the state, and implement effective support programs for students. We need to reevaluate our basis for standardized testing to ensure that schools are tested fairly.

As your Congressman, I will take strong action to help ensure that our education system works for all of the residents of the 18th Congressional District, and provides equitable access for our residents to obtain the skills and preparation they need to compete and thrive in today’s and tomorrow’s economies and workforces.

If you support providing our schools with more funding, implementing new programs to better prepare our students, and reevaluating the way we measure success in our school system, please make a donation to my campaign.

In partnership,

Marc

**

clean_body: Hi Marc Flores for Congress, Education is the key to all opportunity, and we owe it to our children to give them every opportunity to succeed. It is inexcusable that some schools in our community struggle to provide the education that every child deserves. Today, there remains one school in District 18 that potentially may be shut down due to being deemed "Improvement Required" (IR). This is unacceptable. We need to provide adequate funding to all of our schools so they can hire good teachers, provide quality support from the state, and implement effective support programs for students. We need to reevaluate our basis for standardized testing to ensure that schools are tested fairly. As your Congressman, I will take strong action to help ensure that our education system works for all of the residents of the 18th Congressional District, and provides equitable access for our residents to obtain the skills and preparation they need to compete and thrive in today’s and tomorrow’s economies and workforces. If you support providing our schools with more funding, implementing new programs to better prepare our students, and reevaluating the way we measure success in our school system, please make a donation to my campaign. In partnership, Marc Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website (www.marcfloresforcongress.com) Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Four More Years
body:
We're energized. We're mobilized. We're organized. And we're ready four more years of results from Governor Eric Holcomb!This week, he made it off.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/breaking-records-again-468949?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Four More Years!_** We're energized. We're mobilized. We're organized. And we're ready four more years of results from **Governor Eric Holcomb**!

This week, he made it official, as **Governor Holcomb** filed for re-election as your governor. As you probably know, that's not as easy task when you're looking to make a statewide ballot in Indiana. Volunteers from across the state helped us collect more than 9,000 petition signatures from Hoosiers in ALL 92 counties (double the requirement!). Those signatures then were certified by county clerks across the state.

As **Governor Holcomb** and I entered the Secretary of State's office together on Tuesday morning to officially file, I couldn't help but be thankful for each of you who helped get us there. It's our county party teams, our campaign county coordinators and our grassroots volunteers who worked so hard last year collecting these signatures...and it's this same team who I know will deliver victory for **Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, President Trump, Vice President Pence** and our entire Republican team in November.

It's full steam ahead...and four more years!

-Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:_Governor Eric Holcomb, First Lady Janet Holcomb _**_and**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** pause for a quick photo with the Holcomb campaign team at the Statehouse before **Governor Holcomb** goes to file to signatures to earn a place on the 2020 gubernatorial ballot. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59acf47402&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Governor Holcomb’s Next Level Agenda Advances_** As the 2020 legislative sessions continues, **Governor Holcomb’s** 2020 Next Level Agenda makes progress, including:
* Making our roads safer – a hands-free driving law unanimously passed an Indiana House committee this week.
* Holding schools & teachers harmless for ILEARN scores – separate legislation passed the Indiana House and Senate unanimously.
* Keeping our kids safe – raising the age to purchase tobacco and e-cigarettes to 21, and increasing enforcement – a bill passed the House, and separate legislation has moved in the Senate as well.
* Making health care more affordable and transparent – legislation creating an All-Payer Claims Database passed an Indiana House committee this week
* Saving taxpayer dollars in interest – legislation to pay cash for capital projects at six universities across Indiana (projects already approved in the last budget) has passed both the Senate and the House...and it's now heading to **Governor Holcomb's** desk.

**Governor Holcomb’s **2020 Next Level Agenda is dedicated to Putting People First by creating a safer, healthier & more efficient Indiana. As the legislative session keeps moving forward, continue following us here for updates!

Plus, the Statehouse is a busy place...check out this photo of **Governor Holcomb** addressing the **Martin Luther King, Jr.** Annual Celebration at the Statehouse!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=480a2cffe4&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| **_Congress of Counties: Next Weekend_** Congress of Counties is quickly approaching! Our two-day (January 31-February 1) Republican training event is already _**next weekend**_! [_**\-- > REGISTER NOW <\--**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d961b88355&e=1acd9bb3d6) During this two-day event there will be a multitude of [breakout sessions](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8cb90aaab4&e=1acd9bb3d6) you can attend that will give you the knowledge to win elections across Indiana! A few examples of the breakout sessions you'll see at Congress of Counties are:
* Preparing for Election Day
* Campaign Fundraising
* Campaign Finance
* Diversity: The Art of Thinking Independently Together
* Understanding Social Media
* Data Center: The Basics & How to Create Walkbooks

...just to name a few! [Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=62473b3710&e=1acd9bb3d6) before it's too late! You won't want to miss this event as we dive into our campaigns and work to keep Indiana on a roll under Republican leadership!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Impeachment Hoax Continues_** Democrats are still unable and unwilling to accept the outcome of the 2016 election, as impeachment proceedings in the Senate ramped up this week.

Democrats like Pelosi, Schiff, Schumer and “The Squad” will stop at nothing to discredit and slander our president **Donald J. Trump **and his accomplishments. This impeachment hoax is an embarrassment to our country, and the Democrats should be held responsible for this clear waste of time that is preventing meaningful work from being done in Congress.

That’s why we need your help to stop this sham! [Help support Hoosier Republicans that will fight for President Trump and continue to deliver results for all Americans.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=18577fb404&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: We're energized. We're mobilized. We're organized. And we're ready four more years of results from Governor Eric Holcomb!This week, he made it off.... | | | | | | | Four More Years! We're energized. We're mobilized. We're organized. And we're ready four more years of results from Governor Eric Holcomb! This week, he made it official, as Governor Holcomb filed for re-election as your governor. As you probably know, that's not as easy task when you're looking to make a statewide ballot in Indiana. Volunteers from across the state helped us collect more than 9,000 petition signatures from Hoosiers in ALL 92 counties (double the requirement!). Those signatures then were certified by county clerks across the state. As Governor Holcomb and I entered the Secretary of State's office together on Tuesday morning to officially file, I couldn't help but be thankful for each of you who helped get us there. It's our county party teams, our campaign county coordinators and our grassroots volunteers who worked so hard last year collecting these signatures...and it's this same team who I know will deliver victory for Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, President Trump, Vice President Pence and our entire Republican team in November. It's full steam ahead...and four more years! -Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Governor Eric Holcomb, First Lady Janet Holcomb andChairman Kyle Hupfer pause for a quick photo with the Holcomb campaign team at the Statehouse before Governor Holcomb goes to file to signatures to earn a place on the 2020 gubernatorial ballot. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Governor Holcomb’s Next Level Agenda Advances As the 2020 legislative sessions continues, Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda makes progress, including: Making our roads safer – a hands-free driving law unanimously passed an Indiana House committee this week. Holding schools & teachers harmless for ILEARN scores – separate legislation passed the Indiana House and Senate unanimously. Keeping our kids safe – raising the age to purchase tobacco and e-cigarettes to 21, and increasing enforcement – a bill passed the House, and separate legislation has moved in the Senate as well. Making health care more affordable and transparent – legislation creating an All-Payer Claims Database passed an Indiana House committee this week Saving taxpayer dollars in interest – legislation to pay cash for capital projects at six universities across Indiana (projects already approved in the last budget) has passed both the Senate and the House...and it's now heading to Governor Holcomb's desk. Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda is dedicated to Putting People First by creating a safer, healthier & more efficient Indiana. As the legislative session keeps moving forward, continue following us here for updates! Plus, the Statehouse is a busy place...check out this photo of Governor Holcomb addressing the Martin Luther King, Jr. Annual Celebration at the Statehouse! | | | Congress of Counties: Next Weekend Congress of Counties is quickly approaching! name: Bennet 2020
subject: New TV Ad: LAUNCHED ✅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team -

Some pundits will try to tell you that primary voters have made up their minds.

That couldn't be further from the truth, team.

[An unprecedented number of New Hampshire primary voters - 62% - are undecided or open to changing their mind.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab44/134673f2/8559568/69975bdc/2537354258/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeksad?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

That's why we've launched a new set of ads - to reach out to these undecided voters and show them that Michael is the opposite of Trump.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab44/134673f2/8559568/69975bdc/2537354258/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeksad?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") | | | [WATCH AND DONATE >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab44/134673f2/8559568/69975bd3/2537354258/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeksad?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

There are less than three weeks until New Hampshire, and we need your support to spread the word about this ad.

name: LC
subject: FWD: Should Trump be removed from office?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Hey Team - I'm emailing to make sure you had a chance to look at our earlier message with everything going on this week.

This is a historic moment. The Senate will vote on whether or not to remove Trump from office soon. Before then, we need 43 more grassroots Democrats in %%POSTAL ZIP CODE%% to let us know where they stand.

We're counting on a response from you, Team. Please let us know by midnight tonight:
| | **Should Donald Trump be removed from office?**

From: **Impeachment Alert**
Date: Sun, Jan 19, 1:28 PM
Subject: Should Trump be removed from office?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Team: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell just released his proposed rules for President Trump's impeachment.
Since the first day of his presidency, Trump has gotten away with one corrupt act after another. Now that impeachment has reached the Senate, we have a chance to finally hold him accountable. But it won't happen if Democrats don't speak up.
**With Donald Trump 's Senate trial starting TODAY, we need to know where grassroots Democrats stand. We're conducting a time-sensitive impeachment poll in 34223 - but we're still 17 responses short, and we haven't heard from you yet. **

| | **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: A new poll shows Trump trailing "A Democrat" by 4.9% in Ohio, 12.9% in Michigan, 9.8% in Pennsylvania, and 13.4% in Wisconsin. But between 15.6% and 19.3% of voters in each of those states are undecided. And millions of voters stayed home in 2016, handing Trump the election. That's why we need to know: **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8f/6e9863e8/80ba293/1db05164/494172157/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/HXwICSOz") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8f/6e9863e8/80ba293/1db05164/494172157/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/HXwICSOz") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf8f/6e9863e8/80ba293/1db0516a/494172157/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200124c.ND&refcode2=zH7MZYjiEQtI08LZ3cjC")

name: Tommy Tuberville
subject: BREAKING: New Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Peter,

Did you see this yet?

A new poll is out in our neck-and-neck Republican primary race... and I am concerned.

It’s shows failed career politician Jeff Sessions LEADING me by four points!

This poll is just one snapshot. But it’s a wake-up call, and ALL of the polls show that it’s going to be close. While we’ve been building incredible grassroots momentum across Alabama, it’s clear the that the SWAMP is fighting back.

With just weeks until the March 3rd primary, your help now is more important than ever.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal=2C=20National=20Political=20&=20Organizing=20Director?=
subject: Building Up the Battlegrounds
body:
Hi everyone,

Happy Friday! My name is Caroline and I will be taking over for Christiana. While I have been at the DNC for almost two years, this is my first email on behalf of the DNC Talent Bank, and I couldn’t be more excited to be your conduit for jobs and training opportunities.

Please see a long list of jobs below, and I wanted to highlight one job opening here at the DNC -- we have just started our search for a Labor Political Director. This new hire will oversee outreach and engagement strategy to reach, engage, and mobilize this incredibly important constituency. The link to apply is attached and below. Please apply and/or circulate to your networks.

Additionally, as you already know, we are proud to hold the 2020 Democratic National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. As a part of that effort, we are seeking diverse talent to help us plan and organize. We are looking for a wide range of people with skills in community engagement, event logistics, finance, operations, IT, and more! If you are interested in working for the convention, please submit your resume here. As we build out our team, we will post more specific positions. People with all levels of experience and fields of interest are encouraged to apply!

REMINDER
Sign up here to receive our weekly emails and ensure we have your resume.
If you want a job added to our weekly email, send the job description and application to teamblue@dnc.org.

In Solidarity,

Caroline

Caroline Welles
teamblue@dnc.org |@TheDemocrats
DNC Talent Bank Manager

Upcoming Training Opportunities 🙌
Best Practices Institute Training Opportunities — The Best Practices Institute (BPI) is the shared training department of the DNC and the ASDC. Be on the lookout out for emails from Cheyenne Davis at the BPI regarding additional training opportunities and other BPI updates.
Train the Trainer (T3) Webinar Program
Where: Virtual
When: Every Tuesday and Thursday at 7:00 p.m. ET through May 23.
What: This is a free six-week, twelve-part webinar course, covering all aspects of grassroots campaigning. This program seeks to expand the skills of progressive activists and volunteers by ensuring that comprehensive training is free and accessible for Democrats all over the country. Register for T3 today, and help us take our country back in 2020!
RSVP for this Week’s Trainings:
Tuesday, April 23rd
Thursday, April 25th

DNC News and Updates 🚨
Follow the DNC War Room Here

Jobs ✍
We’re just the messenger, but we know these organizations are looking for applicants like you! **We also highly encourage you to check out the vacancies at the DNC Association of State Democratic Committees across the country. The Democratic Party’s infrastructure will be one of the keys to our success, and we need great applicants like you in all of our states.** (All new jobs are marked with a 🔥)

FAQs 🙋
How does the DNC Talent Bank work?
You submit your resume and fill out a short questionnaire.
You will receive weekly emails with current job openings, training opportunities and updates for you to take advantage of.
We will continue to review your materials and help match you with current job openings in the progressive space (i.e. campaigns, state parties, partner organizations etc.).
If your skills, expertise and interests align with a job opening, we will send your resume to the person hiring who will then reach out to you!
What is the DNC Team Blue Pipeline Program?
For those of you who are new, now that we have your resume and know a little about you, you are automatically a member of our new Team Blue Pipeline Program. Joining the Team Blue Pipeline Program means you will be considered for campaign jobs across the country, receive invitations to free, top-level trainings provided by the DNC ASDC Best Practices Institute, and have opportunities for professional development and networking in a number of campaign fields at the state and national level.
I already submitted my resume and want to submit an updated resume!
If you would like to send us an updated resume, please resubmit your updated resume here! We will make sure it gets added to your original profile in the talent bank.
==============================================

name: Wendy
subject: Fwd: [Update] Your opinion on the impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
At the end of the day, this trial is about doing what's right for the American people.
| | | Friend, I'm really disturbed by what I've seen of the impeachment trial so far. Senate Republicans were united in blocking the admittance of key witness testimonies - even though a new poll shows nearly three quarters of Americans believe those witnesses should be allowed to speak.
---
I have a hunch you're ticked off, too - so I wanted to bump this back up to the top of your inbox. **At the end of the day, this trial is about doing what 's right for the American people. So I'm asking 895 more supporters to make their voices heard before midnight tonight:**
| | **Should the Senate impeachment trial include witness testimony?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk64-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk64-su-nd")
---
Thanks,
-Wendy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Wendy Davis
Date: Tue, Jan 21, 2020
Subject: Your opinion on the impeachment trial:
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk64-su-nd")
Friend: For only the third time in our nation's history, a presidential impeachment trial is underway in the Senate. Each U.S. senator took a solemn oath to serve as an impartial juror as they consider convicting Donald Trump of high crimes and misdemeanors.
**But to execute the role of impartial juror, the Senate must receive full evidence of the president 's behavior.** Sadly, Mitch McConnell is turning his back on the oath he swore - and turning his back on our Constitution - by not allowing for new witness testimony.
Is denying the American people the full truth really the standard for a fair and impartial trial? Moments like these test our country's character - and right now, Mitch McConnell is failing. **I don 't want my grandbabies to grow up in a world where their leaders take the easy way out - and that's why, together, we must demand better from the Senate.**
**I 'm counting on 2,700 supporters - including you - to make your voices heard on the impeachment trial before midnight. Speak out against Mitch McConnell by answering the following question:**
| | **Should the Senate allow witness testimony in the impeachment trial?**
---

clean_body: At the end of the day, this trial is about doing what's right for the American people. | | | Friend, I'm really disturbed by what I've seen of the impeachment trial so far. Senate Republicans were united in blocking the admittance of key witness testimonies - even though a new poll shows nearly three quarters of Americans believe those witnesses should be allowed to speak. I have a hunch you're ticked off, too - so I wanted to bump this back up to the top of your inbox. At the end of the day, this trial is about doing what 's right for the American people. So I'm asking 895 more supporters to make their voices heard before midnight tonight: | | Should the Senate impeachment trial include witness testimony? | | | "" | "" Thanks, -Wendy \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Wendy Davis Date: Tue, Jan 21, 2020 Subject: Your opinion on the impeachment trial: "" Friend: For only the third time in our nation's history, a presidential impeachment trial is underway in the Senate. Each U.S. senator took a solemn oath to serve as an impartial juror as they consider convicting Donald Trump of high crimes and misdemeanors. But to execute the role of impartial juror, the Senate must receive full evidence of the president 's behavior. Sadly, Mitch McConnell is turning his back on the oath he swore - and turning his back on our Constitution - by not allowing for new witness testimony. Is denying the American people the full truth really the standard for a fair and impartial trial? Moments like these test our country's character - and right now, Mitch McConnell is failing. I don 't want my grandbabies to grow up in a world where their leaders take the easy way out - and that's why, together, we must demand better from the Senate. I 'm counting on 2,700 supporters - including you - to make your voices heard on the impeachment trial before midnight. Speak out against Mitch McConnell by answering the following question: | | Should the Senate allow witness testimony in the impeachment trial? | | | "" | "" Thank you, Wendy | If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "". name: Team Collins
subject: HYPOCRISY WATCH: Sara Gideon complains about donations she accepts...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
In her latest campaign ad, Maine House Speaker and Democratic Senate candidate Sara Gideon criticizes pharmaceutical companies that "have absolutely bought their way into all of our laws," but what the ad doesn't mention are the tens of thousands of dollars that Gideon has taken from... you guessed it, PHARMACEUTICAL COMPANIES.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
**_HYPOCRISY WATCH: _****Sara Gideon complains about pharmaceutical money while accepting donations from pharmaceutical companies**
**Bangor, ME** - In her latest campaign ad, Maine House Speaker and Democratic Senate candidate Sara Gideon criticizes pharmaceutical companies that "have absolutely bought their way into all of our laws," but what the ad doesn't mention are the tens of thousands of dollars that Gideon has taken from... you guessed it, PHARMACEUTICAL COMPANIES.
In a new [web ad](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) today, the Collins for Senator campaign points out that, as Speaker of the House, Gideon maintained a state leadership PAC that [directly took donations](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) from drug companies such as Eli Lilly, Merck, Pfizer, AstraZeneca, and PhRMA. According to [news reports](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0), "among the largest contributors to Gideon's state PAC was PhRMA, an association of leading pharmaceutical companies that spent $27.5 million on lobbying activities in 2018, according to federal disclosures. The association has given $4,250 to Gideon since 2014. She has also accepted at least $9,800 from top health insurance providers, including Aetna, Cigna, and Anthem."
**Sara Gideon 's Maine Leadership PAC Took $23,750 Directly From Big Pharma, Major Drug Companies, Pharmacies, And The Insurance Industry:**
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[(https://mainecampaignfinance.com/#/exploreCommitteeDetail/4851)](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Gideon's hypocrisy, however, doesn't stop in Augusta. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, Gideon has accepted thousands of dollars in donations from leadership PACs including Chuck Schumer's PAC which has taken [at least $35,000](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) from the pharmaceutical industry.
_" Sara Gideon says the pharmaceutical industry has bought its ways into all of our laws. If that's true, then she should tell Mainers what the pharmaceutical industry bought with the tens of thousands of dollars that it has given her. This is yet another example of Gideon's hypocrisy. She says one thing, and does the exact opposite hoping no one will notice," said Kevin Kelley, spokesman for the Collins for Senator campaign._
[Donate](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

SusanCollins.com
](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE2MjE1MzES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjI2MTE1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Tina
subject: Will Minnesota flip red?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Here are three important numbers you should know about our race for U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200124-eom3?refcode=em200124-eom3&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Here are three important numbers you should know, team:

Donald Trump lost Minnesota by just **1.5 percentage points** in 2016, which means he is going all out to win this time around and even pledging to spend up to **$30 million** to turn Minnesota red.

Now, Democrats only need to win **four seats** to take back the Senate this year -- but that's only if we hold on to every single seat we already have.

**Trump and his allies will do whatever it takes to flip Minnesota red. That means Tina's seat could seriously be in jeopardy -- and with it, virtually any chance of a Democratic majority. New Jersey may be known as a blue state, but that isn't stopping Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell from doing whatever it takes to defeat Cory. We need to be prepared for the false attacks from special interests and dark money groups that are sure to come our way. This is why it's critical that we meet our initial $350,000 fundraising goal so we have the resources to fight back. **Please donate right now -- whatever you can -- to help Cory win big against the eventual Republican nominee in November.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200124_BFS_20200124-fr-BFS-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

subject: We’re under his skin

body:

---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=d0e2373e01&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | In case you missed it: We got under Donald Trump's skin. Again. Mike's new ad -- focused on Trump's lack of support for members of our military -- really struck a nerve. Seeing it on Fox News? Well, that made it even harder for President Trump to ignore. So he couldn't -- he took to Twitter and wouldn't even mention the issues Mike brought up in his ad. That's because President Trump knows he's wrong. He knows his actions are making our country unsafe and harming Americans in uniform. **Our friends and family need to know what's at stake -- and that what we're doing is working.** [**Share Mike's new ad -- and the coverage that shows how much it really got under President Trump's skin -- on Facebook right now.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=9df6150c52&e=f54746ec54)

clean_body: Trump can’t ignore this. | | | | | | | | In case you missed it: We got under Donald Trump's skin. Again. Mike's new ad -- focused on Trump's lack of support for members of our military -- really struck a nerve. Seeing it on Fox News? Well, that made it even harder for President Trump to ignore. So he couldn't -- he took to Twitter and wouldn't even mention the issues Mike brought up in his ad. That's because President Trump knows he's wrong. He knows his actions are making our country unsafe and harming Americans in uniform. Our friends and family need to know what's at stake -- and that what we're doing is working. | | "WATCH AND SHARE >>" | Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020 Copyright © 2020. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 909 Third Ave, New York, NY 10022 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

>
Elizabeth doesn't host any fundraisers where donors can only meet her if you write a big check. And she doesn't take a dime from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

So simply put: the only way we can do this important work is if grassroots supporters respond to this email with a donation.

We're putting every single contribution we receive today to work in real time. Because the outreach, advertising, and organizing investments we make right now are critical to our victory plan.

But if we don't reach our fundraising goals, we won't be able to make all of the investments we need.

**[You have the power to help Elizabeth connect with as many people as possible and inspire them to get out and caucus. Please chip in $2 or anything you can so that we can carry out our full plan to win.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a082/45c30650/1e1ce2733/66e136b4/1348560473/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xV0ZfRUdSX05GRl9QXzIwMjAwMTI0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1WF_EGR_NFF_P_20200124_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren
